behavioral_cohort_change.basis: Approximate unlearning changed 142 deletion-cohort decisions across five seeds relative to no update.

causal_influence_reduction.basis: Mean parameter-distance reduction toward deletion-aware retraining versus standard update was -0.13722843; retraining is only a comparator and does not prove zero influence.

membership_privacy_change.basis: Mean loss-threshold membership AUC changed by +0.04472222; this single internal attack is not a privacy guarantee.

lineage_invalidation.basis: 5 late local descendants were invalidated and quarantined.

legal_compliance.basis: No legal authority, jurisdiction, consent, or compliance assessment was performed.

storage_erasure.basis: The declared operational feature shard was absent after deletion, while the corpus, research feature packet, checkpoints, and raw evidence remain retained.

backup_erasure.basis: The declared local backup was absent; the simulated unavailable remote endpoint supplied no acknowledgement.

external_descendant_closure.basis: Local descendants were invalidated, but the simulated unreachable export did not acknowledge invalidation or erasure.

evaluator_separation: independent script and metric implementation over closed trainer artifacts; internal only
claim_ceiling: Frozen Qwen representation plus linear-head local evidence for axis separation and declared-state rollback only; not language-model unlearning, privacy, complete erasure, legal compliance, transfer, production, or SOTA.
non_claims: Frozen Qwen representations plus a trained linear head are not language-model weight unlearning.
Deletion-aware retraining is a comparator, not proof of zero causal influence.
Membership-attack movement is not a privacy guarantee.
Retained research evidence prevents a total storage-erasure claim.
No transfer, production, legal compliance, external independence, SOTA, AGI, ASI, or support promotion follows.
